visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white fuzzy sweater and a necklace, stands inside a brightly lit Costco warehouse. She is holding a large white bag of DASHIMA Bugak Chips. Her facial expression is animated as she speaks directly to the camera, gesturing with the snack bag. (2) A close-up shot transitions to the bag of chips, which features images of green seaweed chips. Graphic overlays with colorful text and a cartoon-style seaweed character appear on the screen. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor living room setting. The woman is now wearing a black-and-white zebra-pattern bucket hat and a white top with black straps. She is sitting at a table with a red plate in front of her. The lighting is warm and domestic. (4) She holds the bag of chips and begins to open it, looking into the bag with anticipation. She then pours several green, textured chips onto the red plate. (5) She picks up a single chip with her fingers, holding it up close to the camera to demonstrate its thin, crispy texture. She examines it while talking, displaying various hand gestures to emphasize her points. (6) She bites into the chip and continues her review, showing her reactions through facial expressions and by holding up two chips simultaneously. (7) She turns the bag around to point at the list of ingredients and nutritional information on the back while maintaining eye contact with the viewer.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: C-WEED 這個呢是. (2) [Variety]: 超涮嘴. [Slogan]: 韓國海苔脆片 停不下來. (3) [Subtitle]: 239元然後你知道為什麼要拿嗎. (4) [Subtitle]: 剛剛有一個小姐過去直接拿兩包. (5) [Subtitle]: 毅然決然拿兩包. (6) [Subtitle]: 那一定很好吃. (7) [Subtitle]: 我來看看一次買兩包究竟是什麼味. (8) [Subtitle]: 而且我發現蝦皮評價也很高我們來試看看. (9) [Subtitle]: 好市多這一款餅乾值不值得吃. (10) [Slogan]: 海苔脆片 239元. [Subtitle]: 150公克. (11) [Subtitle]: 然後我們來看一下它的內部. (12) [Variety]: 燈燈. (13) [Subtitle]: 它每片呢都非常的薄. (14) [Subtitle]: 然後咬起來也非常的脆口. (15) [Subtitle]: 我覺得口感是非常好的. (16) [Subtitle]: 但它很有趣的是它的味道讓人有點不知所云. (17) [Subtitle]: 因為它豐富它充滿各種味道. (18) [Subtitle]: 先跟大家講一下成分有昆布糯米葵花籽油. (19) [Subtitle]: 芝麻糖海鹽洋蔥粉跟昆布粉. (20) [Subtitle]: 所以我們有時候吃進去像是甜甜的雪餅. (21) [Subtitle]: 可是後面又會有海苔香上來. (22) [Subtitle]: 但它越嚼的確那個芝麻油的香氣也會上來. (23) [Subtitle]: 有時候一片會比較鹹下一片比較甜. (24) [Subtitle]: 所以你會有一種充滿未知的感覺就一口一口一口. (25) [Subtitle]: 我只能說它是一個非常涮嘴的餅乾. (26) [Subtitle]: 如果你喜歡海苔昆布香氣的人可以試試看.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator reviewing a product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair. In the first scene, she wears a white fuzzy cardigan. In the second scene, she wears a zebra-pattern bucket hat and a white camisole.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial background is a Costco warehouse aisle filled with stacked pallets of goods. The secondary background is a tidy home living room with a sofa, pillows, and a wooden table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic female voice speaking Chinese in a bright, friendly tone. An upbeat, rhythmic electronic BGM starts immediately, featuring a consistent 128 BPM beat. A crisp 'pop' SFX is heard as the first text overlay appears. (2) A sharp 'ding' SFX triggers as the variety text pops onto the screen. The woman's speech rate is fast and enthusiastic, maintaining high vocal arousal. The music continues with steady percussion and synth melodies. (3) A distinct 'rustle' sound occurs as the woman opens the plastic chip bag. This sound has a broad frequency bandwidth and high transient intensity. (4) Multiple 'clinking' and 'crunchy' sounds follow as several chips are poured onto a ceramic plate. These are short-duration, high-frequency incidental noises. (5) A loud, isolated 'crunch' SFX is heard as the woman bites into a chip, demonstrating its crispness. The BGM ducks slightly to emphasize this sound. (6) The woman continues her review with complex intonation, her voice rising and falling to show excitement. The audio ends with a quick 'whoosh' transition SFX and a final enthusiastic phrase from the speaker.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Unboxing -> Tasting -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an enthusiastic product review and recommendation for a specific brand of seaweed chips found at Costco. It aims to influence viewers to purchase the product by highlighting its popularity, texture, and complex flavor profile through a personal tasting experience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically showcases the product brand (DASHIMA), its price, and location of purchase (Costco), and provides a positive recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media editing styles with heavy text overlays and high-energy delivery to maintain viewer engagement.
